novel_features.name: Repository discovery
novel_features.description: Search Docker Hub repositories with agent-ready JSON, compact output, and live/local source controls.

novel_features.name: Repository details
novel_features.description: Inspect repository metadata and tags from one CLI surface for image selection and automation.

novel_features.name: Offline archive workflow
novel_features.description: Sync Docker Hub resources into the local store so agents can search and analyze without repeated live calls.

description: Docker Hub public API. Search container images, browse tags, check sizes, inspect Dockerfiles, and explore the world's largest container registry. No authentication required for public repositories (rate limited to ~18 req/min).
